question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero questions of the user. It immediately ran the solution and explained it, with no engagement points.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed for the user. The parity insight was presented as a finished observation rather than as a question.

scaffolding.rationale: No scaffolding exists since there are no questions. The Pair revealed the entire solution and answer in one shot.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and friendly, but it's a one-way lecture; the user merely confirms understanding with no genuine back-and-forth.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
